bodyContent:
7 Conversion Killers on Healthcare Websites
Kevin
March 5, 2026 
No Comments
Healthcare websites often lose potential patients due to preventable design and usability mistakes. Learn the seven most common conversion killers and how to fix them.

images.alt: Dermatology lead cost case study results: $37 per lead, 1,617 total leads over 22 months
Four factors that determine dermatology lead cost: lead quality, campaign structure, conversion tracking, and website conversion rate
Comparison showing inflated agency lead counts versus real dermatology patient inquiries that drive actual bookings
Google Ads campaign structure diagram showing how search and Performance Max campaigns work together to achieve $37 dermatology lead cost
Dermatology lead cost benchmark scale showing optimized range of $25-40 per lead, with this case study achieving $37 per lead
